summary: The diff implements nearly all requested requirements for the Luminia Group site. The welcome popup (REQ-1), main landing page (REQ-2), subsidiary cards grid (REQ-3), Launching Soon modals (REQ-4), and image asset references (REQ-5) are all present in the modified files. However, there is no evidence that the actual image files were added to frontend/public/assets/generated — the diff shows zero added files, only code references to the images. A few extra features beyond the spec were also introduced.

missing_requirements.requirement: All generated product/service images must be placed as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no ADDED FILES at all. The image files (e.g., luminia-gadgets-watch.dim_600x400.png, luminia-gadgets-headphones.dim_600x400.png, etc.) are referenced in the code but there is no evidence they were actually placed in frontend/public/assets/generated.

hallucinated_features.description: A PlaceholderPage component with a different logo path not matching the specified image-3.png
hallucinated_features.reason: The file summary mentions frontend/src/components/PlaceholderPage.tsx as a Coming Soon placeholder page using /assets/generated/luminia-logo-correct.dim_400x120.png, which was not requested in the build spec.

hallucinated_features.description: A ManifestoSection with a blockquote and stats row on the main landing page
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify a manifesto section or stats row. This entire section with quote, attribution, and stats (7 Subsidiaries, Ambition, Vision) is extra functionality beyond the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: Keyboard arrow key navigation for cycling through images in the Launching Soon modal
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies Escape key support for closing the modal. ArrowLeft and ArrowRight keyboard navigation for image cycling was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A hero section referencing a non-specified hero background image hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.jpg
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request lists specific required images but does not include a hero background image. This file is referenced in HeroSection.tsx but was not part of the specified generated images list.
